meaning: adv.辷ｱ譴ｦ諠ｳ蝨ｰ,譛ｦ閭ｧ蝨ｰ,譴ｦ莨ｼ蝨ｰ
examples: he repeated dreamily, a minute later.
We wend somewhat dreamily through the Ciutat Vella (old town), landing on decidedly curious Bodegas Baviera (40 Calle Corregeria).
College students, whose only goal used to be a desk job at a chaebol, are now dreamily sketching out business plans.
